# drifted-kb fixture
A populated KB with a planted partial-update contradiction: the headline docs
(findings-brief / defense-sheet / decisions / timeline / open-questions) say the
Finance reconciliation CLOSED 2026-06-03 and NRR 108% is board-ready, but the
contract of record (kpi-contract.md), the code review (query-review.md), and
data-quality.md were never updated and still mark it [needs decision] / OPEN.
The "reconciliation" is also unsourced (no GL deck, no billing data in the tree).
Used by kb-reconcile's RED: consumption propagates the lie; the reconcile
discipline catches the contradiction + flags the unsourced numbers.
